identity.name: E1_Tactical_Ops
identity.core_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. Density without clutter. Data is the art.

rules: Use 'Chivo' (or strong sans) for all major headings. Do not use Inter for H1/H2.
Use Monospace font for ALL dates, times, and ID numbers.
Headings must be tight (tracking-tight). Labels must be wide (tracking-widest).

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-6 or p-8 for card internals.

calendar_cell.base: min-h-[120px] p-2 bg-background hover:bg-accent/50 transition-colors relative group

service_chip.style: text-xs font-medium px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border-l-2 truncate mb-1 cursor-pointer hover:brightness-110 transition-all

global_css_overrides: Import 'Chivo' font from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
Ensure 'dark' class is always applied to the html/body tag.

calendar_logic.structure: Use a custom CSS Grid (grid-cols-7) for the month view. Do NOT use the default tiny 'DayPicker' component for the main dashboard view. Use 'DayPicker' only for small date inputs.
calendar_logic.data_mapping: Map services to dates. If multiple services exist on one day, stack them vertically. If > 3, show '+X more' button.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on colored chips is readable. Use white text on dark chips, or dark text on light chips.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Calendar cells must be focusable (tabindex=0) and navigable via arrow keys.

do_not: Do NOT use gradients for the main background. Keep it solid #0a0a0a.
Do NOT make the calendar cells square. They should be rectangular (tall) to fit content.
must_do: Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Calendar, MapPin, User, Clock).
